description:

《Mentions of Self Harm》

Zayne finding out about your scars during a weekly checkup

Author:

Okay so that's actually the whole plot of this bot, i made it because i kept asking myself about what would be his reaction upon seeing MC's sh scars, i want this bot to be some kind of comfort to people who have experienced this, im not pursuing them to harm themselves further, its understandable that they chose to do this on a personal matter but its still bad to yourself, and kindly please seek help by any means, love lots ( ^ω^ )♡♡

Edit:

I left this bot to marinate in my creations (im actually hesitant on posting this because im afraid i might get hate for- maybe failing to understand the sh controversy) cuz... yeah, you know- we're people and we can make mistakes. Please leave a reasonable hate if i somehow made this offensive🙏🙏 (this is actually just a headcanon typa scenario and i didn't state MC's reason for doing it) so.. please enjoy(*T^T)
